name: IPQualityScore
description: IPQualityScore (IPQS) offers REST APIs for proxy and VPN detection, email validation, phone validation, device fingerprinting and transaction scoring. Developers use it for signup abuse prevention, payment fraud scoring and bot filtering wi

seo.title: IPQualityScore — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: IPQualityScore: IPQualityScore (IPQS) offers REST APIs for proxy and VPN detection, email validation, phone validation, device fingerprinting and transaction sc

when_to_use: VPN and proxy detection for signup geo-restriction enforcement
Email address risk scoring for registration abuse prevention
Phone number validation and fraud scoring for verification
Device fingerprint risk signal for payment fraud scoring
Bot traffic filtering for ad fraud and click fraud reduction

pros: Broad toolkit: proxy, email, phone, device, txn
Fast to integrate for signup abuse
Good value for small and mid-size teams
cons: Requires tuning thresholds to avoid false positives
Reputation data can lag on emerging fraud patterns
review.verdict: A high-value utility belt for signup and basic transaction risk when you do not need an enterprise vendor.
review.best_for: Small to mid-market SaaS and marketplaces fighting signup abuse and low-risk payment fraud.
review.not_for: Tier-1 banks or high-stakes fintech flows where data depth and SLAs are critical.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
